summary: Fixed learnings harvest parsing in pulse_learnings.py. The script was failing due to invalid JSON in one deposit and incorrectly handling structured learning objects vs plain text.
learnings: Fixed two issues: (1) Enhanced extract_learnings_from_deposit() to handle both list-of-objects and list-of-strings formats for learnings in deposits, (2) Fixed invalid JSON syntax in D3.1-plan-generator.json where string values were missing quotes. The harvest command now correctly extracts text from structured learning objects with 'text' and 'tags' fields.
concerns: None - fix is backwards compatible and handles multiple deposit formats gracefully

decisions.decision: Enhanced extract_learnings_from_deposit to handle multiple formats
decisions.rationale: Deposits have varying formats for learnings field - some use structured objects with text/tags, others use plain strings. Function now handles both gracefully.
JSON parsing error was blocking harvest process. Fixed unquoted string values in functional validation section.
